markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Elise Watt for the Engagement Manager (Account Management) role.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proven Strategic Pivot:** At AirDNA, Elise shifted from high-volume content to a data-driven strategy, halving output while doubling converting articles within 3 months by focusing on high-ROI topics (tutorials, data insights).](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**AI-Native Workflow:** Uses AI daily for tasks (SOPs, writing) and has built complex workflows in AirOps, including a tool to convert podcast transcripts into SEO-optimized blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Data-Driven Reporting:** Monthly reports track north-star metrics (conversions, engaged sessions) and analyze top performers/losers. Quarterly audits compare content ROI to optimize resource allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** Seeks a strategic role with execution support to focus on strategy across multiple clients, leveraging her background in account management and AI expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Topics

### Background & Motivation

  - [**Career Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Intl. Rescue Committee (IRC): Project/Program Manager for an entrepreneurship program.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Freelance: SEO, copywriting, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [AirDNA: Full-time transition to content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [**Motivation for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [**Strategic Focus:** Shift from wearing all hats (strategy, execution, marketing) to a pure strategy role with execution support.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Account Management:** Bridge past experience (working with businesses at the IRC) with current content expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**AI Impact:** Excited by the scale of what's achievable with AI, citing a 3-month AI-powered outcome as potentially equivalent to a year of traditional work.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

### Content Strategy: AirDNA Case Study

  - [**Initial Strategy:** High-volume content (\~200 articles) to build authority and cover broad industry keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Problem:** Diminishing returns from "quick wins" after \~1 year.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Data-Driven Pivot:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [**Analysis:** A performance deep dive revealed a dozen articles drove 80% of product conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Insight:** High-converting content focused on product tutorials, unique data insights, and middle/bottom-of-funnel keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**New Strategy:** Halved content output to focus on fewer, higher-quality articles and optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Result:** Doubled the number of converting articles in 3 months with half the output.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### AI & AEO Approach

  - [**Daily AI Use:** Employs AI for tasks like creating SOPs and assisting with writing.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Workflow Automation:** Built complex workflows in AirOps, including one that converts podcast transcripts into SEO-optimized blog articles.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [**AEO (AI Engine Optimization) Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Core Principle:** High-quality content with unique data/perspective performs well for both SEO and AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
          - [**Structure:** Optimize for LLM snippet preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
          - [**Technical SEO:** Implement schema to improve crawlability.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**GrowthX's AEO Tool:** George introduced GrowthX's new tool, which combines AI visibility tracking with SEO/technical audits and a content workflow layer to connect data to strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### Reporting & Client Onboarding

  - [**Reporting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [**Monthly:** Comprehensive reports tracking keyword growth, rankings, AI citations, engaged sessions, conversions, and bounce rate.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [**Quarterly:** Audits comparing ROI across content types (e.g., blogs vs. research reports) to optimize resource allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [**GrowthX Client Onboarding:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Process:** An 8-week strategy sprint to audit systems (GA4, GSC), define strategy, and calibrate content with a sample article.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Technical SEO:** A foundational audit is performed to ensure content can be indexed and perform.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Client Success Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**Champion:** A marketing-experienced client who trusts GrowthX's process.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
      - [**Review Process:** A streamlined review process (e.g., one primary reviewer) to avoid becoming "word babysitters."](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**Access:** Technical access to systems and publishing platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [**ICP (Ideal Customer Profile):** GrowthX now uses a formal ICP to score and qualify prospects, proactively addressing potential blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George Haikal:** Follow up with Elise Watt regarding next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/FasN1xzC8NTfh4sZhRDxyCs2NmB4LPdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
